# Stable lock for VERL GRPO training environment (Python 3.10)
# This lock avoids known incompatibilities observed with vllm>=0.18.

# Core RL trainer stack
verl==0.7.1
ray[default]==2.54.1
hydra-core==1.3.2
datasets==4.8.4
dill==0.4.1
pyarrow==23.0.1
pandas==2.3.3
numpy==1.26.4
tensordict==0.10.0

# Model/training stack
# Keep torch stack aligned with vllm==0.12.0 constraint.
torch==2.9.0
torchvision==0.24.0
torchaudio==2.9.0
transformers==4.57.6
accelerate==1.13.0
peft==0.18.1
trl==0.9.6
pydantic==2.12.5

# Rollout backend (must satisfy VERL 0.7.1 constraints)
vllm==0.12.0
py-cpuinfo==9.0.0
einops==0.8.1

# Utilities often required by training scripts
sentencepiece==0.2.1
protobuf==6.33.0
tensorboard==2.20.0
wandb==0.25.1
